name: Mock Chicken Legs
recipeIngredient: 2 lb. lean pork, cut into cubes
2 cans cream of mushroom soup, thinned with a little milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Alternate veal and pork cubes on each meat skewer.
2. Roll each skewer in egg and cracker crumbs.
3. Brown the skewered meat in a skillet with oil.
4. Layer the browned meat in a baking dish.
5. Cover with mushroom soup.
6. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour.
